push.description: Push notifications delivered via AWS IoT Core MQTT over WebSocket. No FCM/Google dependency.

deliveryFlow.description: Pinpoint manages campaigns, segments, and analytics. Actual push delivery uses IoT Core MQTT topics per user. Each device subscribes to topic: opusaimobility/notifications/{userId}
steps: 1. App registers endpoint with Pinpoint (userId, device info, preferences)
2. Backend publishes to Pinpoint campaign OR direct message
3. Custom channel Lambda receives Pinpoint event
4. Lambda publishes to IoT Core MQTT topic: opusaimobility/notifications/{userId}
5. Device receives push via persistent MQTT WebSocket connection
